tasks.title: configDifficulty adaptive-difficulty engine
tasks.description: Combined-difficulty score (geometric mean of dimension hardness) driving an adaptive engine that targets the 0.25–0.45 challenge zone; reconcile with the simpler 10-measure BPM/notes stepper.

Update all setters to match 'in line' sheet music style.

To be detailed / interview needed.

tasks.title: Bug — geen geluid na vaak van instrument wisselen

tasks.title: Repeat after me — lang nummer in stukken kappen voor herhalingsblokken
tasks.description: Call-and-response practice mode: chop a long song into chunks (e.g. 2 bars), teacher plays, player plays back, advance. Touches Sequencer repeat/segmentation.

tasks.title: Instrument-carousel — rename / re-icon + nieuwe categorieën & instrumenten
tasks.description: Re-categorise/re-icon the instrument carousel into 8 categories incl. new synth category, plus added instruments. Done in Wave 2.

tasks.title: Instrument-carousel — rename / re-icon + nieuwe categorieën & instrumenten
tasks.description: Detailed instrument-carousel rework: re-icon keys/guitars/bass/strings/wind/tuned-perc/voice and add accordion, contrabass, harmonica, xylophone, plus a new synth category (square/lead/pad). Verify every smplr slug loads.

tasks.title: Fermata-glyph stem-richting (boven/onder)
tasks.description: renderFermataGlyphs always draws the arc-down fermata above the staff; should detect stem direction and use the lowercase glyph below for stem-up notes.

tasks.title: Keyboard range setter — narrow-screen ellipsis + black-key precision + percussion variant
tasks.description: Parked keyboard range-setter refinements: ellipsis collapse on very narrow screens, black-key boundary precision (currently snaps to white keys), and a percussion DrumPad range setter slice.

tasks.title: Daily streak + freeze tokens
tasks.description: Day counts if ≥1 melody is practiced; auto-earned freeze tokens (max 2) protect the streak.

tasks.title: Periodieke technical-debt & architectuur-audit
tasks.description:
A RECURRING/periodic audit of the whole app. Each run, produce a findings list with concrete refactor/merge suggestions, checking:

- [ ] Correct implementation (behaviour matches spec/docs)
- [ ] Class/type definitions are sound and consistent
- [ ] Separation of concerns (each module owns one responsibility)
- [ ] Single source of truth — no duplicated state/logic
- [ ] MERGE opportunities — similar functionality with parallel/duplicate implementations to unify
- [ ] NFRs met: performance/frame-rate, maintainability, accessibility, reliability, test coverage, bundle size

tasks.title: P0 Bug — kanban board "select project first" fout (project niet in projects-tabel)
tasks.description:
When opening the kanban board at port 5173, the board shows "select project first" because the music-melody-trainer project was not registered in the Neon projects table. Fixed by inserting the project row via kanban-db. Root cause: /kanban-init only writes to the local SQLite projects table, not to Neon. The Neon board reads from its own projects table which was empty.

Error-bericht komt misschien omdat er geen project wordt meegegeven bij aanmaak kaartje. Zorg voor een setter in het kaartje, of geef autom. een project mee, of stel nog een andere oplossing voor.

tasks.title: In-app kanban-bord (debug → kanban + terugknop) + items uit backlog/plan
tasks.description: Add a button to open a native in-app kanban board via debug → kanban with a back button, sourced from a committed kanban.json generated from BACKLOG + IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.

tasks.title: Bug — tuplet slot/length mismatch
tasks.description: [3:2]q w gets a phantom quarter-rest; tuplet generation corrupts note planning so durations/offsets do not align with measure length. Likely needs the events refactor.

tasks.title: Geparkeerd batch — transpositie-curve, two-octave range, preset-tween, range polish

tasks.title: Transpositie-setter revisie — compacte dubbele verticale carousel
tasks.description: Two coupled vertical half-step carousels on treble/bass staff (concert names + sheet notes on a non-linear curve); the non-linear primitive is also proposed for the range setter. Core wired; tangens curve still open.

tasks.title: Range setter — beta/drag default tuning
tasks.description: Set mid-bow beta default to 0.6 and drag px to 10. Done.

tasks.title: Clef octave-variant system voor transpositie-setter (8va/15ma/8vb/15vb)
tasks.description: On drag past ~1 octave off-staff the transposition setter should switch to 8va/15ma/8vb/15vb octave clefs and offer octave-shifted quick-picks. Blocked on OCTAVE_VARIANTS missing treble 8vb/15vb and bass 15va/15vb.

tasks.title: N.C. generator pitch-pool fallback
tasks.description: Implement the melody pitch-pool fallback during N.C. passages (previous chord → next chord → tonic 1-3-5 triad). Deferred because no current song uses N.C.

tasks.title: Passing chords — sus2 (kleur-doorgangsakkoord)
tasks.description: sus2 passing chord explicitly 'Not implemented in this version'; deferred until a colour-passing-chord category exists.

tasks.title: Daily challenge + weekly boss-measure
tasks.description: Auto-generated daily challenge (3× XP) based on level, plus one harder week-long 'boss' melody with an exclusive badge and XP bonus.

tasks.title: Generator setter in de bladmuziek — playback / generation / generation advanced
tasks.description:
Three in-staff generator setters (playback, generation, generation advanced) per staff incl. a chords balk, wired to InstrumentSettings/chordSettings. Rebuilt in carousel style.

Generator settings overlay:
- Zorg dat de dimensies van de 3 carousels hetzelfde zijn als die in de instrument setter.
- Zorg, in lijn met de note colouring setter, voor de note pools:
roots: noten C4 C5  (treble) of C3 C4  (bass).
chords: noten C4 E4 G4 C5 (en octaaf lager voor bass)
scale: de volledige toonladder
chromatic: de volledige toonladder, met 3 voortekens ervoor (mol, kruis, herstel) (zoals het add/ext akkoord)
- voeg setters toe voor de akkoorden
- notes / measure: ik wil daadwerkelijk noten zien, maak een maat, met maatstreepjes. Print een hele noot (1), twee halve noten (2), 3 kwartnoten en een rust (3), etc. tot en met 16 16-den noten. De carousel is breed genoeg om een maat in te passen, en nog net de vorige en volgende setting te tonen.

tasks.title: Bug — chord melody komt uit generator i.p.v. song-definitie

tasks.title: Preset — Bladmuziek (Sight-reading)
tasks.description: Practice preset: scale notePool, weighted, R1 notes visible no audio then R2 audio, medium variability.

tasks.title: useLessonEngine hook + applyLessonConfig + success evaluator
tasks.description: Orchestration hook that applies a lesson's appConfig like a preset, locks forbidden settings, watches the success condition (5 types: listen_reps, input_test_score, ear_correct, free_play_duration, exam_pass).

tasks.title: Refactor — parallel arrays → events
tasks.description: Refactor from parallel arrays to an event model (also the suspected fix path for tuplet slot/length issues).

tasks.title: LessonOverlay + LessonContext UI
tasks.description: Instruction UI (title/instruction/tip/progress) plus a completion card with XP/skill deltas and next-lesson actions, exposed via LessonContext.

tasks.title: Tech-debt — series-boundary regen + JIT inside Sequencer.start()
tasks.description: Phase-2-adjacent entanglement left open: series-boundary regen + JIT inside Sequencer.start(); deeper randomizeScaleAndGenerate orchestration (display-note map duplicated ~3x).

tasks.title: Profiel-schema + useProfile (localStorage)
tasks.description: Versioned localStorage profile under mmt_profile with useProfile hook (read/write, completeLesson(), passExam()).

tasks.title: Tech-debt — indefinite-repeat encoding split (Infinity vs -1)
tasks.description: Indefinite-repeat encoding is split between Infinity and -1; normalization pending.

tasks.title: Granular skill-tracking model + recordAttempt + read API
tasks.description: Rolling 20-result windows across 11 dimensions with a proportional credit/blame recordAttempt algorithm and read helpers (mastery/display/hardness/proficient).

tasks.title: Tech-debt — metronome stale on song load
tasks.description: Metronome stays stale on song load (wrong meter, ignores fermata); root of HBD extra-count issue.

tasks.title: Tech-debt — Range R1–R4 refinements
tasks.description: Range setter R1–R4: per-note cascade, keyboard-trigger, bound-flash bug, yellow→white boundaries.

tasks.title: Practice Hub start screen + recommendation engine
tasks.description: Exercise Mode landing screen with a 'Recommended for you' card and topic buttons (Scales/Rhythm/Chords/Ear/Surprise), driven by a recommendation engine reading the profile.

tasks.title: Exercise-mode topic filter sub-screens + content unlock filter
tasks.description: Per-topic picker showing the user's unlocked content (shuffle default) via a useExerciseMode filter; plus advanced settings overlay (unlocked-only) and an Expert Mode toggle that disables the filter.

tasks.title: In-session HUD + per-note feedback + perfect-measure flash
tasks.description: During-play overlay (key·BPM auto-hide, measure counter, streak, accuracy bar, pause) with non-blocking green/red notehead feedback and a gold flash for a 100%-correct measure.

tasks.title: Test-harness voor fragile core (Sequencer/Song/generation/highlight)
tasks.description: Add direct tests for the least-covered core: Song append/getWindow, generation-pipeline golden test (§6b), convertRankedArrayToMelody rules, useSheetMusicHighlight pure helpers, Sequencer abort-after-stop; add the two §6 grep guards and coverage thresholds.

tasks.title: Sync notesPerMeasure=0 met staff disablement
tasks.description: When notesPerMeasure is set to 0 in GenerationSetterOverlay, the staff should be visually disabled (dimmed/crossed out) and no notes generated. Currently 0 means "don't generate" but the staff is not visually synced to this state. Align the disabled state in the UI with the 0-value in InstrumentSettings.
